top.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
top.summary: The US military says it struck Iranian drones and radar sites. Tehran responds by targeting US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.

top.summary: The Russian president's refusal comes after his Ukrainian counterpart wrote an open letter calling for face-to-face talks.

top.title: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
